case_title: DENNIS E. CARTER VS. THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SHORT CAUSE TRIAL SET FOR SEP-02-2010 CONTINUED TO SEP-08-2010 AT 9:30 AM IN 318, JUDGE DONALD J. SULLIVAN, CLERK: V. MACK, NOT REPORTED (D318)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CARTER, DENNIS E. AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF SEP-02-2010 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEALS ASSIGNED TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON SEP-02-2010 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 318. (206)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON SEP-08-2010 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (D-318).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARTER, DENNIS E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE OFFICER SHOULD NOT HAVE TOWED THE CAR WITHOUT CREDITING THE EXPLANATION OF THE OWNER OR WAITING LONGER TO SEE IF THE CAR WAS ABANDONED , AS THE CAR DID NOT CONSTITUTE A SAFETY VIOLATION AT THE TIME OF TOW. THE COURT FURTHER FINDS THAT THE CITY AND COUNTY IS NOT IMMUNE TO SUIT FOR THE OFFICER'S RUSH TO JUDGMENT BASED ON THE LACK OF LEGAL SUPPORT PROVIDED ON THIS POINT BY THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT THE CCSF, RETURNED "ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (RECEIVED DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR SEP-02-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-02-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT CARTER, DENNIS E. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
